violations.text: The 2-door sliding refrigerator was observed held at an ambient temperature of 54 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Service arrived during time of inspection and an ambient temperature of 39 degrees Fahrenheit was obtained. Establishment is to fill out daily cooler logs to monitor temperature of unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025
